items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has demonstrated high-level finishing ability with back-to-back spinning strikes.
items.quote: But CLD had the very impressive back-to-back spinning finishes. Spinning back elbow against Eric Anders and a spinning back fist finish against Marco Tulio.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is a durable fighter who is difficult to finish.
items.quote: I get it. Caner has been a very durable guy and tough to finish.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier's durability is likely to decline due to his age and accumulated damage.
items.quote: He's 42. He's 42 and at some point all that damage catches up to you

items.claim: Dricus du Plessis has a significant physical size advantage over Kamaru Usman.
items.quote: He is a massive dude and Kamaru is not a small guy, right? ... I think Drizz is just bigger at this point.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman does not look as physically large at middleweight for this fight compared to his previous middleweight appearance.
items.quote: I don't know if Kamaru is as big now going back up to 85 than the last time he was at middleweight. ... he just does not look as big this time out

items.claim: Kamaru Usman will be unable to replicate Hamzat Chimaev's wrestling success against Dricus du Plessis.
items.quote: the thought around this about how Camaro could win was, oh, Camaro is just going to take him down and Camaro is going to do to Drius what Hamzot did to Drius. I just don't see it.
